nodes.clerp: abbreviations and capitalized words, especially those related to computing
single character variables and parts of words that look like names or list-like data structures
technical or jargonistic terms that are specific to certain fields.
abbreviations and/or scientific and medical terminology
capitalized words and names along with some related words.
mentions of Ireland and the word "scenario"
words containing the character sequences "rop," "rol," "gat," "rif," or "galo"
words ending in "d" or "sh" or containing "add", especially if they are verbs or nouns.
words with the "ter" sound in them
terms related to political science and physics
a mixture of political parties, medical terminology, and words containing the same suffixes
verbs in scientific or technical writing, especially those describing actions, processes, or results
technical words or jargon from several different fields
content from multiple different languages in the same document.
proper nouns, especially names of people, places or organizations
the last three letters of words.
various keywords in programming languages, markup languages, and mathematical notations
the word "of" and sometimes the phrase "of the"
terms related to sports leagues and championships
words that are commonly used in conversation
content related to the history of car or animal racing
mentions of athletes or people in a sports context and descriptions of their positive attributes.
